30;\n\n  const raw = callMcpTool<any[]>(\"list_issues\", args);\n  return raw.map((i: any) => ({\n    number: i.number,\n    title: i.title,\n    state: i.state,\n    author: i.user?.login ?? i.author?.login ?? \"\",\n  }));\n}\n\n/** View a single issue. */\nexport function viewIssue(repo: string, number: number): IssueDetail {\n  const [owner, name] = repo.split(\"/\");\n  const raw = callMcpTool<any>(\"issue_read\", { owner, repo: name, issue_number: number });\n  return {\n    number: raw.number,\n    title: raw.title,\n    state: raw.state,\n    author: raw.user?.login ?? raw.author?.login ?? \"\",\n    body: raw.body ?? \"\",\n    createdAt: raw.created_at ?? raw.createdAt ?? \"\",\n  };\n}\n\n/** List comments on an issue. */\nexport function listComments(repo: string, issueNumber: number): IssueComment[] {\n  const [owner, name] = repo.split(\"/\");\n  const raw = githubApi<Array<{\n    user: { login: string };\n    body: string;\n    created_at: string;\n  }>>(`/repos/${owner}/${name}/issues/${issueNumber}/comments`);\n  return raw.map((c) => ({\n    author: c.user.login,\n    body: c.body,\n    createdAt: c.created_at,\n  }));\n}\n","numLines":70,"startLine":1,"totalLines":70}}}

30;\n\n  const raw = callMcpTool<any[]>(\"list_issues\", args);\n  return raw.map((i: any) => ({\n    number: i.number,\n    title: i.title,\n    state: i.state,\n    author: i.user?.login ?? i.author?.login ?? \"\",\n  }));\n}\n\n/** View a single issue. */\nexport function viewIssue(repo: string, number: number): IssueDetail {\n  const [owner, name] = repo.split(\"/\");\n  const raw = callMcpTool<any>(\"issue_read\", { owner, repo: name, issue_number: number });\n  return {\n    number: raw.number,\n    title: raw.title,\n    state: raw.state,\n    author: raw.user?.login ?? raw.author?.login ?? \"\",\n    body: raw.body ?? \"\",\n    createdAt: raw.created_at ?? raw.createdAt ?? \"\",\n  };\n}\n\n/** List comments on an issue. */\nexport function listComments(repo: string, issueNumber: number): IssueComment[] {\n  const [owner, name] = repo.split(\"/\");\n  const raw = githubApi<Array<{\n    user: { login: string };\n    body: string;\n    created_at: string;\n  }>>(`/repos/${owner}/${name}/issues/${issueNumber}/comments`);\n  return raw.map((c) => ({\n    author: c.user.login,\n    body: c.body,\n    createdAt: c.created_at,\n  }));\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":7,"newStart":42,"newLines":7,"lines":[" /** View a single issue. */"," export function viewIssue(repo: string, number: number): IssueDetail {","   const [owner, name] = repo.split(\"/\");","-  const raw = callMcpTool<any>(\"issue_read\", { owner, repo: name, issue_number: number });","+  const raw = callMcpTool<any>(\"issue_read\", { owner, repo: name, issue_number: number, method: \"get\" });","   return {","     number: raw.number,","     title: raw.title,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
